chief_complaint: A 76-year-old man presented with diabetic ketoacidosis and a thrombotic complication.
history: The patient had no prior history of diabetes and presented with symptoms of DKA, which is characterized by insulin deficiency leading to hyperglycemia, ketosis, and metabolic acidosis.
exam: No specific physical examination findings are provided.
labs: No specific laboratory results are provided, but the patient had hyperglycemia and was in a pro-thrombotic state.
